title: lumiere perception beat sheet
description: The structured output of a reference-video watch. Produced by the perceive workflow (scout-spine -> per-segment fan-out -> merge). Designed to prefill launch-video.lock.json scenes[] (one beat -> one scene; the scene id slug is synthesized at lock time) so a watched reference can seed a creation lock. One file per analyzed reference video.

path.description: Local path or URL of the reference video.

watched_at_tier.description: The detail tier the fan-out segments were watched at (the configured default unless the user opted into another).

has_audio.description: Whether the source carries an audio track.

spine.description: The narrative arc as understood from the cheap low-tier full-video skim, BEFORE detailed per-segment watching. 2-4 sentences. This is the prior each segment agent was handed so parallel watching keeps temporal coherence.

narrative_summary.description: The refined whole-video narrative AFTER detailed watching: what the video is, its arc, the product, the house-style read. Supersedes the spine.

coverage.description: Audit trail proving the biblical thorough-coverage rule was honored: total subchunks watched across all segments equals the tier's chunks_for_full_coverage_thorough (N) from inspect.

chunk_count.description: N = chunks_for_full_coverage_thorough from inspect for this tier. The number of frame-coverage subchunks the whole video should be split into.

segments_covered.description: M = number of parallel fan-out segments the N subchunks were grouped into.

subchunks_watched.description: Total subchunks actually watched across all segments. MUST equal chunk_count for full coverage.

palette_hex.description: Dominant / notable colors observed across the video, as hex. Union of per-segment palettes.

scene_cuts_seconds.description: Detected hard-cut timestamps in seconds (from analyze), sorted ascending.

audio.description: Audio read (absent or minimal for silent launch videos).

beats.description: The merged, time-sorted beats across all segments. Each beat maps onto one launch-video.lock.json scenes[] entry.

timestamp_seconds.description: Beat start on the master timeline. Maps to scenes[].start.

description.description: What happens in this beat, in prose. Maps to scenes[].storyboard.

energy.description: Beat energy: rising | settle | focused | building | reset | peak | resolve | steady. Maps to scenes[].energy.

effect_category_tags.description: Which of the 8 canonical effect categories this beat draws on. Perception reasoning trail; no direct lock counterpart.

effect_ids.description: Best-guess canonical effect ids from effects/index.json that recreate this beat. Validated against the catalog by validate-beatsheet.mjs. Maps to scenes[].effects[].ref.

motion_notes.description: Observed motion mechanics (ease, stagger, direction, timing). Perception-only; informs restage.

text_on_screen.description: Verbatim copy/text visible in this beat. Feeds scenes[].content.

segment_index.description: Which fan-out segment surfaced this beat (provenance for debugging coverage).

continuity_notes.description: Cross-segment observations: effects or motions that span a segment boundary, repeated motifs (bookends), or beats that the merge flagged as possible duplicates from overlap windows.
